title: zanthoxylum armatum var. ferrugineum
intro: Zanthoxylum armatum var. ferrugineum, also known as Korean prickly ash, is a variety of the Zanthoxylum armatum plant, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Korean prickly ash include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure levels. In herbal medicine, Korean prickly ash is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
